description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is predominantly white with clean lines and geometric forms, complemented by green lawns and landscaped trees around the property. There is a driveway leading to a covered carport and garage, as well as a spacious backyard area that includes a patio and additional greenery. The property is enclosed by a low, white perimeter wall, enhancing privacy while maintaining an open, airy feel. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with flat roofs, large horizontal windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a driveway, carport, and enclosed yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double carport, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the expansive backyard, patio area, and large horizontal windows along the back facade.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the building, the flat roof, and the enclosed yard with green space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and a more private side of the bungalow with fewer windows.
